Train Cancellations.name: Kufutwa kwa Treni
Train Cancellations.description: Treni zinafutwa au kucheleweshwa sana bila taarifa au fidia ya kutosha

Train Ticket Prices.name: Bei za Tiketi za Treni
Train Ticket Prices.description: Nauli za treni ni ghali sana, ongezeko zaidi ya mfumuko wa bei, bei zisizo sawa

Flight Delays.name: Ucheleweshaji wa Ndege
Flight Delays.description: Ndege zinacheleweshwa au kufutwa, mawasiliano duni, ugumu wa kudai fidia

Lost Luggage.name: Mizigo Iliyopotea
Lost Luggage.description: Mifuko haifiki mahali pa kwenda, ufuatiliaji wa polepole, fidia isiyotosha

Bus Route Cuts.name: Kupunguzwa kwa Njia za Basi
Bus Route Cuts.description: Njia zinafutwa, marudio yanapunguzwa, jamii za vijijini zinapoteza ufikiaji wa basi

Pothole Damage.name: Uharibifu wa Mashimo ya Barabara
Pothole Damage.description: Mashimo yanayoharibu magari na kuhatarisha waendesha baiskeli, halmashauri zinachelewa kurekebisha

Parking Fines.name: Faini za Maegesho
Parking Fines.description: Malipo yasiyo ya haki ya maegesho ya kibinafsi, utekelezaji mkali, alama za kuchanganya

Fuel Prices.name: Bei za Mafuta
Fuel Prices.description: Bei za petroli na dizeli ni kubwa sana, zinashuka polepole wakati bei ya jumla inaposhuka

Broadband Speed.name: Kasi ya Broadband
Broadband Speed.description: Kasi ya intaneti iko chini sana kuliko inavyotangazwa na kulipwa

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Maeneo Yasiyo na Mtandao
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Hakuna mtandao wa simu katika nyumba, sehemu za kazi, au njia za usafiri

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Kupanda kwa Bei Katikati ya Mkataba
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Bili za simu, broadband na TV zinaongezeka wakati wa mikataba iliyofungwa

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Muda wa Kusubiri Huduma kwa Wateja
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Masaa ya kusubiri kuzungumza na mtu halisi

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Makampuni yanafanya kuwa vigumu kwa makusudi kufuta au kujitoa

Roaming Charges.name: Malipo ya Roaming
Roaming Charges.description: Malipo yasiyotarajiwa ya simu unaposafiria nje ya nchi, ongezeko la bei baada ya Brexit

Energy Bill Costs.name: Gharama za Bili ya Nishati
Energy Bill Costs.description: Bili za gesi na umeme haziwezi kulipika, kikomo cha bei bado ni cha juu sana

Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Makadirio ya usomaji yasiyo sahihi, kutoza zaidi, makosa ya bili

Water Bill Increases.name: Ongezeko la Bili ya Maji

Sewage in Rivers.name: Maji Machafu Mitoni

Power Cuts.name: Kukatika kwa Umeme
Power Cuts.description: Usumbufu wa ugavi wa umeme, urejesho wa polepole, fidia isiyotosha

Smart Meter Problems.description: Smart meter hazifanyi kazi, zinapoteza utendakazi baada ya kubadilisha mtoa huduma
